author: vvo
subject: v1.4.4
body: ## [1.4.4](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/compare/v1.4.3...v1.4.4) (2016-04-15) ### Bug Fixes * **pagination:** Disabled pagination link can no longer be clicked ([88b567f](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/88b567f)), closes [#974](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/974) * **showMore:** hide showMore when no more facet values to show ([cc31b1a](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/cc31b1a))
